overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk city district in Cyberpunk 2077, featuring a blend of traditional Japanese architecture and futuristic megastructures. The player character walks from a busy commercial street under an elevated highway, through an industrial intersection with smokestacks, and toward a massive corporate tower.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with traditional and modern architecture

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to green railings, approaching an elevated highway overpass

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in same direction along the traditional building facade

entered.detail: tall teal-colored building with bright neon signage and advertisements
low-rise structure with curved black tile roof and red paper lanterns
large concrete overpass structure spanning across the street ahead
heavily damaged modern tower with exposed structure and missing sections
large cylindrical structure with multiple digital advertisement screens
green metal railings lining the edge of the pedestrian walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit cyberpunk street with a teal neon building on the left and traditional Japanese architecture on the right. The camera walks forward past green railings toward an elevated highway overpass, with a damaged skyscraper visible in the distance and a large circular billboard structure on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway

events.description: enters the covered area beneath the elevated highway structure

agents.ego_description: walking under the elevated highway into a covered walkway with digital advertising screens overhead

notable_agents.action: teal sedan driving past on the street to the right

entered.detail: massive concrete columns supporting the highway structure overhead
large illuminated digital billboards mounted underneath the highway showing colorful advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered walkway beneath the elevated highway, supported by massive concrete pillars. Digital advertising screens illuminate the area overhead while vehicles pass by on the adjacent road. The traditional building and street railings fall behind as the circular billboard recedes into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection with red gate structure and pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: exits the covered highway underpass into open intersection area
crosses the marked pedestrian crosswalk with yellow stripes

agents.ego_description: exiting the underpass and crossing the wide intersection marked with yellow zebra stripes, passing under a red gate structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with blue hair and white outfit crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: large red structural gate with vertical pillars marking the entrance to the district
multi-story buildings with various storefronts and signage
dense network of electrical wires crisscrossing above the street

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass, the scene opens into a wide intersection dominated by a red gate structure. The camera crosses the yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk, passing other pedestrians including one with distinctive blue hair. Industrial smokestacks become visible in the distance as the covered highway recedes to the left.

events.description: turns slightly left while walking through the intersection toward the industrial district

agents.ego_description: walking through the open intersection surrounded by commercial buildings, heading toward the industrial area with prominent smokestacks

notable_agents.action: green sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: low commercial building with circular 'Tom's Diner' neon signage
tall factory chimneys emitting white smoke visible against the skyline

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a busy intersection surrounded by commercial buildings including Tom's Diner on the left. Industrial smokestacks dominate the distant skyline, emitting white smoke. Vehicles move through the intersection as the camera continues forward, leaving the red gate behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow street leading to corporate megastructure

events.description: turns onto narrower street with massive tower looming ahead

agents.ego_description: walking down a narrower street toward an enormous megastructure tower, with the sun creating a bright flare behind the building

entered.detail: enormous futuristic corporate tower with intricate geometric facade filling the end of the street
tall concrete wall with blue stripes running along the right side of the street
curved ramp structure of the elevated highway system

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the camera turning onto a narrower street flanked by a concrete retaining wall on the right and an elevated highway ramp on the left. The street leads directly toward an enormous megastructure tower that dominates the view, backlit by the bright sun creating a lens flare. The industrial smokestacks and commercial buildings of the previous area are left behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sunlit commercial street through an industrial underpass and into the shadow of a massive corporate megastructure. It begins by walking past a teal neon building and traditional Japanese architecture toward an elevated highway, with a damaged skyscraper and a circular billboard framing the distance. As the camera enters the covered walkway beneath the highway, the open sunlight is replaced by the glow of overhead digital advertising screens and the presence of massive concrete pillars. The scene then opens into a wide intersection marked by a red gate and yellow-striped crosswalks, where the view expands to reveal distant industrial smokestacks emitting white smoke. Finally, the camera turns onto a narrower street flanked by a retaining wall and a highway ramp, moving directly toward an enormous tower that dominates the skyline and creates a bright lens flare against the sun.
